block_00: Learn to use the Martingale strategy now
block_01: The Martingale strategy is 100% accessible to everyone. It is one of the most common approaches to trading and it is quite popular among traders.
block_02: The principle behind this approach is simple: the trader doubles the amount of investment each time the previous deal closes in a loss, until eventually a deal closes in the money. This allows to possibly generate profit and cover the previous losses due to a doubled investment.
block_03: Check out the full article to find an example of how this strategy works and learn to apply it in practice.
